productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex Spo Shoulderbag Black
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this copiously spacious handbag. Inspired by the retro style of the 70s and 80s, this cotton-polyester bag makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe.Made of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenanceOne main zippered compartment with a mobile pouch and an organiser pouchOne zippered compartment on the front Brand logo in silver print all over the front body of the bag, with brand name and logo embroidered on the topWide handles made of synthetic leather for carrying easeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
